# STRAT.051 ? Deliberate Practice (Ericsson)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** performance_excellence
**Domain:** PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focused practice; outside comfort zone; immediate feedback; expert guidance; specific goals; repetition with refinement; 10,000 hours

## Application
Set specific goals; practice at edge of ability; get immediate feedback; seek expert coaching; focused repetition; systematic improvement

## Key Values
- Focused practice
- Edge work
- Feedback loops
- Expert guidance
- Systematic improvement
